name: Holiday Harlequin Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, brandy or pineapple juice, sour cream, butter, and marshmallows in a heavy saucepan.
2. Stir over moderate heat until the sugar is dissolved.
3. Place a candy thermometer in the mixture and boil for about 10 minutes to reach 234°F (soft ball stage).
4. Remove from heat; stir in half of the hot mixture into a 1-quart measuring cup and add semi-sweet chocolate. Stir until the chocolate melts.
5. Quickly stir in walnuts, then turn into a buttered 9x5 inch loaf pan and spread level with the back of a spoon or spatula.
6. Set the pan with remaining syrup into a shallow pan of boiling water. Add white chocolate and cherries and stir until the chocolate melts.
7. Turn into the pan with the chocolate mixture and quickly spread level; let stand until set before cutting into squares.
